purpose: Detect generic visual defaults before they become a repeated system.

rules.recover: Choose one dominant visual idea and remove every effect that does not support hierarchy, state, or narrative.

detect: every section is a rounded container
different information types share one tile anatomy
rules.recover: Use tables, lists, timelines, diagrams, comparisons, or unframed sections according to information semantics.
Lead with the actual product, object, place, state, or literal offer and leave the next section visible.

detect: one generic sans for every role
display size unrelated to copy length
rules.recover: Assign explicit display, body, label, numeric, and code roles with tested fallback and measure.

detect: surfaces differ only by one hue
accent covers most of the page
state meaning depends on color alone
rules.recover: Build neutral separation, reserve accent for decisions, and pair status color with text or icon meaning.
Derive palette from product evidence, brand, environment, and accessibility instead of a fashionable default.
Bind every visible claim to current code, documentation, supplied evidence, or an explicit concept label.
Vary rhythm according to argument, density, interaction, and evidence while keeping alignment anchors stable.
Animate only causality, continuity, hierarchy, progress, or spatial relationship and preserve reduced-motion meaning.
